case_title: IDS PROPERTY CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY VS. PATSY CANDLEY ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-20-2020 CONTINUED TO JAN-12-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) JASHAWN COMBS; TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-12-2021 CONTINUED TO APR-13-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IDS PROPERTY CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CANDLEY, PATSY $11,351.65 PRINCIPAL, $462.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,813.65, SEE SCANNED DOC
